ApprovalKind.description:
What produced an approval item. Extensible pending FB-012's external-gate design — new
kinds are additive, so the attention queue never needs a rewrite (FB-007).
ApprovalKind.title: ApprovalKind

ApprovalState.description: Where an approval sits. Absence of a decision is ``pending``.
ApprovalState.title: ApprovalState

description:
One item in the attention queue: something awaiting a recorded human decision (FB-007).

v0 is engineering only (``kind=pr`` — every open workshop PR is by definition awaiting a
human). External-action kinds join additively once FB-012's gate design lands.

decided_at.description: When it was decided; None while pending.
decided_at.title: Decided At

decided_by.description: Who decided (approver identity); None while pending.
decided_by.title: Decided By

id.description: Approval id, unique within the venture.
id.title: Id

source_ref.description: Reference to the thing being approved (PR url, event id, …).
source_ref.title: Source Ref

summary.description: Plain-language summary of what needs a human.
summary.title: Summary

title: Approval
